positive: A majestic, stylized golden retriever wearing a whimsical circlet of glowing bioluminescent leaves and delicate flowers, sitting centered in a lush, ethereal forest clearing. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau illustration and modern minimalist tattoo art, featuring thick, clean outlines and highly saturated, jewel-toned colors against a clean, cream background. The composition must be symmetrical and highly contrasted, with the dog's silhouette dominating the center. Incorporate fine line details for the flora and crisp, flat color blocking for the dog's fur and accessories. Overhead soft dramatic lighting, vector illustration quality, perfect for apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, low contrast, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, jpeg artifacts, deep shadows, messy, grainy
